SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
DataAccessInterface<T>
Allows services to interact with a data source
HomeController
This controller retrieves product data from the business service layer and sends it to the view so that the products can be displayed on the home page using Thymeleaf.
LoginController
This controller processes login form submissions and interacts with the LoginService to validate credentials.
LoginForm
Holds login form data.
LoginService
This service will validate user credentials by retrieving the user from the database and compare it to the store password.
LogoutController
This controller invalidates the current HTTP session when a user logs out of the application.
MilestoneProjectApplication
 
ProductEntity
This class is used by the data layer to map product data from the database into Java objects for use in the application.
ProductModel
This class is used to transfer product data from the business layer to the web layer without exposing database specific details.
ProductsBusinessInterface
This interface represents the business layer for product management.
ProductsBusinessService
This class retrieves product data from the data layer and converts ProductEntity objects into ProductModel objects for use by the presentation layer
ProductsController
This controller displays product pages and handles creation of new products.
ProductsDataService
This class implements the DataAccessInterface and uses Spring JDBC together with ProductsRepository to perform CRUD operations on products
ProductsRepository
This repository extends CrudRepository and provides custom SQL queries for retrieving products from the PRODUCTS table.
RegisterController
Registration controller (web layer) Uses RegistrationService bean (business layer).
RegisterForm
Holds data from the registration form.
RegistrationService
Registration "business service" Saves the user into the database
UserEntity
This class is used by the data layer to map database rows to Java objects It stores user registration and login information
UserModel
This class is used to transfer user data through the application without exposing persistence layer details.
UsersBusinessInterface
This interface represents the business layer responsible for user management.
UsersBusinessService
 
UsersDataService
Implements the DataAccessInterface and uses Spring JDBC along with the UsersRepository to interact with the MySQL database.
UsersRepository
This repository extends CrudRepository and provides custom SQL queries for retrieving users by ID, username, and email.
